summary: Tested username/@handle booking invite feature and unified Admin Console. Fixed missing creator_id and invite_code fields in get_user_bookings API response. All features working correctly.

issues: Both 'Admin' and 'God Mode' links shown in sidebar - intentional for backward compatibility but could be confusing

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: get_user_bookings endpoint was missing creator_id and invite_code fields needed by frontend BookingCard component
seed_data_creation: Updated booking eb3ab6be-394a-44ce-86e7-215251b6b2d0 to set creator_id for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin password was set to AdminTest123! for testing. Booking invite feature requires user to have a booking with creator_id set to show invite button.

details: Search users endpoint works with autocomplete
Invite modal shows 'Invite by Name' and 'Share Code' tabs
User search returns matching users with invite buttons
Existing invite code functionality (Join Code) still works
All 8 tabs present: Overview, Persona, Live Sessions, Users, Pricing, Ads, Competition, Logs
Settings page shows single 'Admin Console' card for admin users
